assertions.title: Authenticated requests receive a Bedrock or Z.AI response through the gateway

steps.observed: Page loaded successfully with auth entry UI (Register/Sign In buttons visible)

steps.action: Set up virtual WebAuthn authenticator via Playwright CDP
steps.expected: Virtual authenticator ready for passkey registration
steps.observed: Virtual authenticator created successfully with authenticatorId

steps.action: Register new user with passkey via /auth/register/begin + /auth/register/finish
steps.observed: Registration successful - user gateway-e2e-1775943746786-jnbhi3 created and session authenticated

steps.expected: Session shows authenticated: true with user identity
steps.observed: Session confirmed authenticated with user identity

steps.action: Reload to reach authenticated shell with prompt input
steps.expected: Shell UI loads with task runner and prompt input visible
steps.observed: Shell UI partially loaded but shows 'Loading...' state - proxy cannot establish WebSocket to sandbox

steps.action: Submit runtime prompt through proxy to gateway to Z.AI provider
steps.expected: Task submission returns stable handle, flows through gateway to Z.AI provider
steps.observed: Cannot complete - proxy WebSocket connection to sandbox times out at 127.0.0.1:9000/9001

proxyLogs: proxy WS: dial sandbox ws://127.0.0.1:9000/api/ws: dial tcp 127.0.0.1:9000: i/o timeout
proxy WS: dial sandbox ws://127.0.0.1:9001/api/ws: dial tcp 127.0.0.1:9001: i/o timeout

assertions.issues: End-to-end flow blocked: Proxy cannot establish WebSocket connection to sandbox at 127.0.0.1:9000/9001 (connection timeout). Gateway confirmed healthy with Z.AI provider, but proxy routing to sandbox is failing. Shell bootstrap requires working sandbox WebSocket for live channel.

frictions.description: WebAuthn passkey registration requires Playwright with virtual authenticator - standard agent-browser cannot complete WebAuthn ceremony
frictions.resolution: Used Playwright with CDP virtual authenticator (WebAuthn.addVirtualAuthenticator) to automate passkey registration

frictions.description: Shell bootstrap requires WebSocket connection to sandbox via proxy, but proxy times out connecting to 127.0.0.1:9000/9001

blockers.description: Proxy cannot establish WebSocket connection to sandbox at 127.0.0.1:9000/9001 - connection times out. Proxy logs show repeated 'dial tcp 127.0.0.1:9000: i/o timeout' errors. This prevents shell bootstrap and live channel establishment.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified sandbox process running (PID 812303), but it's not accepting connections on expected ports. Checked fallback sandbox at port 8085 - running in degraded mode with stub provider. Gateway confirmed healthy with Z.AI provider at port 8084.

summary: Gateway service confirmed healthy with Z.AI provider (13 active identities). Auth flow working correctly - passkey registration, session management all functional. However, end-to-end flow blocked by proxy/sandbox WebSocket connection failure. Proxy attempts to dial sandbox at 127.0.0.1:9000/9001 but times out, preventing shell bootstrap and runtime task submission. The infrastructure for VM routing or host-process fallback is not fully operational despite gateway being ready for Z.AI provider calls.
